title: Seniors Overpaid Medicare Premiums By $13.4B In 2025. That's About $212 For Every Enrollee, Joint Economic Committee Estimates
summary: Millions of seniors paid higher Medicare premiums last year because of overpayments to private insurers in the Medicare Advantage program.
